CVE-2023-38545.title: curl SOCKS5 heap buffer overflow
CVE-2023-38545.description: This flaw makes curl overflow a heap based buffer in the SOCKS5 proxy handshake.

CVE-2024-99998.title: curl hypothetical unfixed vulnerability
CVE-2024-99998.description: A hypothetical vulnerability in curl that has not yet been fixed on Oracle Linux 9.
